name: gunk-buster
description: Finds context gunk — stale, agent-readable repo residue — before coding agents consume it.

interface.shortDescription: Find stale repository context before agents consume it
interface.longDescription: Scan repository documentation and agent context for stale residue using Gunk Buster's deterministic read-only tools.
defaultPrompt: Scan this repository for context gunk and summarize the findings.
